6.doc: InputValue is a binding to a state containing the current value. This is the pointer to a state.
6.name: InputValue

8.doc: Step allows to set numeric steps, that will be used to increase/decrease the value stepwise.
8.name: Step

9.doc: Max defines the max value of the slider.
9.name: Max

10.doc: Min defines the min value of the slider.
10.name: Min

12.doc: Unit defines the unit to display next to the slider value.
12.name: Unit
